summary: Iteration 50 — auth-required policy on /public-library verified end-to-end. Backend: 41/41 pytest cases pass across test_iteration_50.py (12 new tests), test_iteration_49.py (12 updated), and test_public_library.py (17 updated). Frontend Playwright confirms all four flows: anon → login gate with correct ?next= params; signed-in + opted-in → normal library view; signed-in + not-opted-in → 404 not-found card; signed-in + nonexistent → 404 not-found card (handle-enumeration prevention). OG share endpoint /api/share/u/{username}/library remains anon-accessible for FB/Twitter crawlers (200/404 verified without cookies).
critical_code_review_comments: friend_library.py public_library now uses `viewer: User = Depends(get_current_user)` — FastAPI auto-rejects anon callers at the dependency layer with 401 before any DB I/O happens; this is the right place to enforce the gate.

Handle-enumeration prevention still holds for authed callers: not-opted-in and nonexistent handles both return identical 404 bodies (verified — test_handle_enumeration_prevention passes asserting r1.json() == r2.json()).

OG endpoint cover_public.share_user_library_html remains unauthenticated by design — verified the anon GET returns 200 with og:title/description/image meta for opted handle, 404 for non-opted/nonexistent. This is the documented exception so crawlers can render link previews.

Frontend PublicLibraryView.jsx catches 401 distinctly from other failures (e.code === 401 → needsLogin=true, else notFound=true). next-redirect URL is `encodeURIComponent(location.pathname + location.search)`, so query strings (e.g. ?notour=1) survive the round-trip — confirmed in DOM (`/login?next=%2Fu%2Ffebopta508d%2Flibrary%3Fnotour%3D1`).
PublicCoverProfile.jsx lazy library probe will also 401 for anon viewers; existing try/catch silently hides the 'Browse library' chip — behavior is correct, no leak.
updated_files: /app/tests/test_public_library.py (anon assertions rewritten to 401, added authed sister tests + OG anon tests)
/app/tests/test_iteration_49.py (TestOverlap.test_unauthenticated_no_overlap → test_unauthenticated_returns_401; opted_book_sample fixture now uses opted_session not anon)
/app/tests/test_iteration_50.py (new — 12 tests covering 401 invariants, authed 200/404 split, owner self-view, and OG-stays-public)
test_credentials: Opted-in fixture: TEST_fe_opted_e24c9d@example.com / hunter2pw! / @febopta508d (still valid). Private fixture handle: @febpri4c63f. Fresh users created during run via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: No mongo seeds beyond per-test fresh user registrations. Iteration_48 fixture users still exist and were login-verified at test start.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public library API is auth-gated since 2026-06-26. The two existing test files (test_public_library.py, test_iteration_49.py) were UPDATED — any further tests that hit /api/users/{handle}/public-library MUST use _register()/login session cookies. The OG endpoint /api/share/u/{handle}/library is the explicit exception and stays anon — keep it that way for FB/Twitter crawlers. test_iteration_50.py codifies the new invariants and is now the canonical reference for the policy.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Policy change implemented cleanly: dependency-level auth gate on the FastAPI route, frontend branches on 401 to render the dedicated needs-login card with next-redirect baked into both CTAs.
